# Skagit River Adult Family Home

> Licensed adult family home in Mount Vernon, WA providing compassionate 24/7 residential senior care.

## About
Skagit River Adult Family Home LLC is a Washington State licensed adult family home (DSHS License #758550) located at 2120 Forest Dr, Mount Vernon, WA 98273. We provide personalized residential care for a maximum of 6 residents in a warm, home-like environment with 24/7 awake staff and RN-delegated medication management.

## Contact
- Phone: (360) 723-2907
- Email: skagitriverafhllc2025@gmail.com
- Address: 2120 Forest Dr, Mount Vernon, WA 98273
- Office Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm (care staff available 24/7)

## Services
- Activities of Daily Living (ADL) assistance
- Medication management (RN delegated)
- Memory care (Alzheimer's and dementia)
- Hospice support and coordination
- Respite care (short-term stays)
- Culinary and nutrition services (3 home-cooked meals daily)
- Mobility and transfer assistance
- Housekeeping and laundry
- Engagement and activities program

## Key Facts
- Maximum 6 residents
- 24/7 awake staff coverage
- Washington State DSHS License #758550
- Located in Mount Vernon, Skagit County, WA
- Accepts private pay and long-term care insurance
